Login.title: Sign in
Login.subtitle: Use one of the seeded accounts below.
Login.checkCredentials: Check the provided credentials and try again.

TeacherLayout.title: Teacher
TeacherLayout.subtitle: Manage exams, students, and grading.
TeacherLayout.queueClearDescription: All submitted attempts have already been reviewed.
TeacherLayout.reviewNoticeTitle: {count} {count, plural, one {exam needs} other {exams need}} review
TeacherLayout.reviewNoticeDescription: {count} submitted {count, plural, one {attempt is} other {attempts are}} waiting in the review queue.

TeacherDashboard.title: Dashboard
TeacherDashboard.subtitle: Track the current exam volume, pending grading, and recent activity.
TeacherDashboard.recentExamsSubtitle: Latest created exams and assignment volume.

TeacherAttempts.title: Reviewed Attempts
TeacherAttempts.subtitle: Open a reviewed attempt on its own page to inspect answers or reopen it.
TeacherAttempts.cardSubtitle: Filter by student or exam, then open the full review page.
TeacherAttempts.studentPlaceholder: Filter by student name or email
TeacherAttempts.noMatches: No reviewed attempts match the current filters.

TeacherReviewQueue.title: Review Queue
TeacherReviewQueue.subtitle: Choose an exam, review the submitted attempts, and move through each student in order.
TeacherReviewQueue.cardSubtitle: Open an exam to review its submitted attempts on a dedicated page.
TeacherReviewQueue.empty: All submitted attempts have been reviewed.

TeacherLists.title: Exams
TeacherLists.subtitle: Create, edit, and delete exams.
TeacherLists.deleteText: This action removes the exam and its current assignments.

TeacherStudents.title: Students
TeacherStudents.subtitle: Manage active student accounts.
TeacherStudents.archiveText: The student will no longer appear in active exams.
TeacherStudents.archivedText: The account was moved out of the active exam roster.
TeacherStudents.saveErrorText: Review the form data and try again.
TeacherStudents.updatedText: The student account was updated successfully.
TeacherStudents.createdText: The student account was created successfully.
TeacherStudents.name: Name
TeacherStudents.passwordPlaceholder: Leave blank to keep current password

StudentDashboard.cardSubtitle: Start a new exam, continue an in-progress one, or review your result.
StudentDashboard.noMatches: No exams match the selected filter.

StudentResult.title: Exam result
StudentResult.subtitle: Review your final score, feedback, and return to your exam list when needed.
StudentResult.noOverallFeedback: No overall feedback has been added yet.

StudentAssignmentPage.title: Exam workspace
StudentAssignmentPage.subtitle: Continue your assigned exam and return to the exam list whenever needed.

TeacherExamEditor.createSubtitle: Define the rules, add questions, and optionally assign students right away.
TeacherExamEditor.editSubtitle: Updating questions is blocked after students create attempts to preserve grading data.

TeacherAttemptPage.title: Reviewed attempt
TeacherAttemptPage.subtitle: Inspect the graded answers on a dedicated page.
TeacherAttemptPage.cardSubtitle: This reviewed attempt is open in its own page.

TeacherReviewExamPage.subtitle: Review the submitted attempts for this exam on a dedicated page.
TeacherReviewExamPage.empty: This exam has no remaining attempts to review.
TeacherReviewExamPage.cardSubtitle: Select a submitted attempt and save grading to continue.

AssignmentWorkspace.startWithTimer: The timer will start immediately and you will have {minutes} minutes to finish.
AssignmentWorkspace.startWithoutTimer: Once started, the attempt will be opened immediately.
AssignmentWorkspace.draftSavedText: Your latest answers were stored successfully.
AssignmentWorkspace.submitWithUnansweredText: You still have {count} unanswered {count, plural, one {question} other {questions}}: {questions}.
AssignmentWorkspace.submitText: You are about to finish this exam. You will not be able to change your answers after submission.
AssignmentWorkspace.changeQuestionErrorText: Your draft could not be saved. Try again in a moment.
AssignmentWorkspace.dueDatePassed: The due date has passed. New attempts are blocked.
AssignmentWorkspace.alreadySubmitted: This exam has already been submitted.
AssignmentWorkspace.reopenedNotice: Your teacher reopened this exam. Your previous answers were kept and the timer restarted.
AssignmentWorkspace.expiredNotice: The allowed time has ended. This attempt is being finalized automatically.

AttemptReview.unableToSaveText: Review the scores and try again.
AttemptReview.saveNoticeNext: Grading saved. Opening the next student attempt.
AttemptReview.saveNoticeDone: Grading saved. This exam has no more attempts to review.
AttemptReview.saveNoticeManual: Grading saved. This attempt still needs manual grading.
AttemptReview.saveNoticeMovedBack: Grading saved. This attempt moved back to the review queue.
AttemptReview.reopenText: The student will be able to continue this exam. Existing grades and feedback will be cleared.
AttemptReview.reopenedText: The exam was returned to the student for another submission.
AttemptReview.ungradeTitle: Move this attempt back to review?
AttemptReview.ungradeText: The student submission will stay locked, but this attempt will return to the teacher review queue.
AttemptReview.ungradeErrorTitle: Unable to move the attempt to review
AttemptReview.ungradedText: You can continue grading it in the teacher review queue.
AttemptReview.emptyReview: No attempts are waiting for review.
AttemptReview.descriptionReview: Select a student attempt and continue grading this exam.
AttemptReview.descriptionHistory: Open any reviewed attempt to inspect the answers.
AttemptReview.readOnlyHistory: Read-only history. Move it back to review to edit grading, or reopen it for the student.
AttemptReview.gradingHelp: Grading - Use the stepper to adjust the manual score quickly.
AttemptReview.feedbackReadOnly: Feedback is read-only on reviewed attempts.
AttemptReview.overallFeedbackReadOnly: Overall feedback is read-only on reviewed attempts.
AttemptReview.overallFeedbackPlaceholder: Optional summary feedback for the whole attempt
AttemptReview.selectAttempt: Select an attempt to open its grading details.
